texto: As President Trump quickly moved to limit immigration, civil rights, and environmental protections, I felt fear for my young children, and guilt, too - as if I'd somehow betrayed the unspoken contract all parents make to give our children a better life than ourselves.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laura Moser: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de enfrentar incertezas com ação. O trecho “As President Trump quickly moved to limit immigration, civil rights, and environmental protection…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, vida, children pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de children e fear.

texto: In my career as a writer, I preferred to avoid current events: I wrote young adult novels and book reviews and lifestyle journalism about health and parenting and other such evergreens.
